description: A vertical candid personal photograph (no designed overlay, text, or agency seal) accompanying an ICE tweet about a sentenced gang member/sex-trafficker. It shows a shirtless young man taking a mirror/standing selfie in what appears to be a residential kitchen (cabinets, granite counter, refrigerator and oven visible). He wears a blue bandana on his head, blue patterned shorts, and dark sneakers, and has numerous tattoos across his chest and arms. He holds a long rifle (AK-style with a curved magazine) up over one shoulder and a handgun in his other hand, with a second pistol tucked into his waistband. It carries no on-image text.
